scheduleCallCard.text: Want to talk? Schedule a 15-min intro call with Alexandra, our sales lead.
scheduleCallCard.subtitle: Alexandra Flores · Sales Lead · 15 min · No prep needed

meta.title: Contact — Bias Market
meta.description: Get in touch with Bias Market — book a call or send us a message.

contactPage.headline: Let's talk
contactPage.intro: Questions about setting up your store, pricing, or a bigger partnership? Book a call or send us a message and we'll get back to you.
contactPage.emailBody: For anything else, reach us at

form.name: Name
form.success: Thanks — we got your message and will get back to you soon.
form.error: Something went wrong sending your message. Please try again.

meta.title: Founders — Bias Market
meta.description: Meet the three-person team behind Bias Market, a store builder built for K-pop GOMs and photocard sellers.

founderPage.headline: Three founders, not one
founderPage.intro: Bias Market started as a three-person team. We split the work along what each of us is actually good at, instead of one person trying to do everything.

team.name: Carlos Bonifacio
team.bio: Builds and ships the core product day to day.

team.name: Eliaz Bobadilla
team.bio: Owns the architecture — the backend, data model, and multi-tenant isolation the whole platform relies on.

team.name: Alexandra Flores
team.bio: Gets Bias Market in front of the sellers who need it, and runs how we grow.

cta.heading: Want to talk through your store?
cta.body: If you're running group orders or photocard drops and want to see whether Bias Market fits, reach out directly.

meta.title: Enterprise — Bias Market
meta.description: Bias Market for agencies and larger sellers running multiple stores or high-volume drops.

enterprisePage.headline: For agencies and multi-store sellers
enterprisePage.intro: Running more than one storefront, or drops big enough that you need closer support? We work directly with larger sellers and agencies to fit Bias Market to that scale.

features.title: Multiple stores
features.body: Manage several storefronts — one per artist, group, or drop — without juggling separate accounts.

features.title: Priority support
features.body: Direct access to the team building the product, not a support queue.

features.title: Onboarding help
features.body: We'll help migrate your existing order history and get your first drop live.

features.title: Custom requests
features.body: Tell us what your workflow actually needs — we build in the direction our sellers push us.

cta.heading: Let's talk about your setup
cta.body: Tell us about your stores and volume, and we'll figure out the right fit together.
